name: The Pink Gold of the Desert — 8-Day Luxury Tour: Ouarzazate → Sahara → Valley of Roses

seo.title: 8-Day Luxury Tour 'Pink Gold of the Desert' — Ouarzazate, Sahara, Valley of Roses | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: 8-day luxury tour in Morocco: Ouarzazate, Ait Ben Haddou, Skoura, Valley of Roses, Merzouga (Beldi Luxury Camp), Rissani, hammam and Berber cooking class. Tailor-made.

hero.tagline: The Pink Gold of the Desert — the most authentic Morocco experience

intro: 'The Pink Gold of the Desert' is our flagship upscale tour, designed for total immersion in the landscapes and culture of southern Morocco. Over 8 days, you'll discover Ouarzazate (the 'Hollywood of the desert'), the kasbahs of the Anti-Atlas, the Valley of Roses (Kelaat M'Gouna), the dunes of Merzouga with a night at the Beldi Luxury Camp, Rissani and its souk, the Todra Gorges, and a Berber cooking class. Every stage has been designed to combine authenticity, comfort and wonder.
